race.description: Girls Day Out 7 March C,G & E Class 3 Handicap
race.comment: Former NSW galloper TRUE AMOR (1) was well in the betting when having his first run for the new stable but let supporters down on that occasion. Saves his best form for this six-furlong journey, draws low and gets 3kg weight relief with the claim. Where there's smoke there's fire and rates the testing material. SUPERHERO (7) resumes here but the form he showed when last in work was good enough for a race of this nature. Can run a big race while fresh. MELDUBIOUS (9) has won two of four over this trip and will be at peak fitness for this. Expected to play a role in the finish. HERMAN SAID (13) doesn't know how to run a bad race and may earn some minor money again. The well-related INCA TRAIL (10) (half to 2xG1 winner Overpass) rounds out the selections in a competitive affair.
